headline: Why The BRP (TSX:DOO) Story Is Shifting As 2026 Earnings Setup Takes Shape
summary: The CA$ fair value estimate for BRP has shifted slightly to CA$118.25 from CA$118.95, a move that keeps the modeling range tight while still prompting fresh attention from research desks. Recent reports, including target references around C$105 and US$75, frame this updated fair value in the context of BRP’s perceived ability to gain share in powersports and set up earnings into 2026, despite softer demand signals. As you read on, you will see how these small target tweaks fit into a broader...
